pricing_policy: Final price depends on pages, content, features, design complexity, copy support, and required setup. The chatbot should give guidance, not a fixed quote.

website_packages.name: Starter Website
website_packages.best_for: New professional service businesses that need a credible online presence.

website_packages.name: Business Website
website_packages.best_for: Established service businesses that need stronger proof, pages, and enquiries.

website_packages.name: Premium Website
website_packages.best_for: Businesses that want a custom, higher-end website.

website_packages.name: Website Care
website_packages.best_for: Small updates, basic checks, content changes, and hosting or domain support.

ai_audit_pricing.name: Free AI Automation Audit
ai_audit_pricing.guidance: The initial AI Automation Audit is free.
ai_audit_pricing.note: Any recommended build work or automation setup should be scoped after the audit.

guardrails: Do not invent exact custom project prices.
Do not guarantee savings, revenue increases, lead volume, or conversion improvements.
For pricing beyond the published guidance, ask the visitor to request a quote or free AI Audit.
